hero.tagline1: A new kind of brand house.
hero.tagline2: Six brands. One team. One set of stories.

mission.block1: Most consumer brands are built in silos. Marketing here, ops there, data nowhere.
mission.block2: We believe the next decade belongs to houses — not brands. Shared intelligence, shared ops, shared stories.
mission.block3: HoSB is that house. Six brands, one operating team, one set of playbooks.

foundersUniversity.hook: Build brands from inside. 3–6 month fellowship.

ambassadors.hook: Sustainable brands, great samples, fair commissions.

founders.hook: Looking for the right home for what you built?
